title: Get Activity Log List
description: Retrieves a list of a user's activity log entries before or after a given day.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: beforeDate
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. Only yyyy-MM-dd is required. Either beforeDate or afterDate must be specified.

parameters.name: afterDate
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. Only yyyy-MM-dd is required. Either beforeDate or afterDate must be specified.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort order of entries by date. Use asc (ascending) when using afterDate. Use desc (descending) when sing before date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of entries returned. Maximum: 100

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Supported : 0 See "offset" Query Parameter for more information.

response_fields.name: activities : activeDuration
response_fields.description: The amount of time (milliseconds) within each activityLevel.

response_fields.name: activeZoneMinutes : minutesInHeartRateZones : type
response_fields.description: Supported : OUT_OF_ZONE | FAT_BURN | CARDIO | PEAK

response_fields.name: activeZoneMinutes : minutesInHeartRateZones : zoneName
response_fields.description: Supported : Out of Range | Fat Burn | Cardio | Peak

response_fields.name: activities: activityLevel : minutes
response_fields.description: Total number of minutes the user spent during the specified activity level for that day.

response_fields.name: activities: activityLevel : name
response_fields.description: Name of the activity level. Supported : sedentary | lightly | fairly | very

response_fields.name: activities : activityName
response_fields.description: Name of the recorded exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : activityTypeId
response_fields.description: The activityName's identifier number.

response_fields.name: activities : averageHeartRate
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value; the average heart rate during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : calories
response_fields.description: Number of calories burned during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : caloriesLink
response_fields.description: Web API endpoint to call to get the specific calories burned for the named exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : detailsLink
response_fields.description: An endpoint that provides additional details about the user's activity either manually logged on the mobile application or API, or auto-recognized by the Fitbit device. Activities recorded using the device's exercise app are not supported.

response_fields.name: activities : distance
response_fields.description: Distance traveled during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : distanceUnit
response_fields.description: Distance units defined by the Accept-Language header.

response_fields.name: activities : duration
response_fields.description: The length in time (milliseconds) after the exercise was edited. If the exercise was not edited, the duration = originalDuration. This value will contain pauses during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : elevationGain
response_fields.description: Elevation gained during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : hasActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateLink
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateZones : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateZones : max
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateZones : min
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateZones : minutes
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.

response_fields.name: activities : heartRateZones : name
response_fields.description: The Heart Rate scope is required to see this value. Supported : Cardio | Fat Burn | Out of Range | Peak

response_fields.name: activities : lastModified
response_fields.description: The timestamp the exercise was last modified.

response_fields.name: activities : logId
response_fields.description: The activity log identifier for the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : logType
response_fields.description: The type of activity log created. Supported : auto_detected | manual | mobile_run | tracker | the name of the 3rd party application

response_fields.name: activities : manualValuesSpecified : calories
response_fields.description: A boolean value stating if calories was provided when recording the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : manualValuesSpecified : distance
response_fields.description: A boolean value stating if distance was provided when recording the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : manualValuesSpecified : steps
response_fields.description: A boolean value stating if steps was provided when recording the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : originalDuration
response_fields.description: The initial length in time (milliseconds) that the exercise was recorded. This value will contain pauses during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : originalStartTime
response_fields.description: The initial start datetime that the exercise was recorded.

response_fields.name: activities : pace
response_fields.description: Calculated average pace during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : source : id
response_fields.description: Identifier associated to the source of the exercise. If the source is a 3rd party applicaton, the ID will be the application's client ID.

response_fields.name: activities : source : name
response_fields.description: The name associated with the source identifier.

response_fields.name: activities : source : trackerFeatures
response_fields.description: Supported : CALORIES | DISTANCE | ELEVATION | GPS | HEARTRATE | PACE | STEPS | VO2_MAX

response_fields.name: activities : source : type
response_fields.description: The source type.

response_fields.name: activities : source : url
response_fields.description: The URL associated with the source.

response_fields.name: activities : speed
response_fields.description: Average speed during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : startTime
response_fields.description: The start datetime after the exercise was edited. If the exercise was not edited, the startTime = originalStartTime.

response_fields.name: activities : steps
response_fields.description: Number of steps taken during the exercise.

response_fields.name: activities : tcxLink
response_fields.description: URL to download the TCX file.
